shared_properties: The HUD uses a navy panel body, gold border, and high-contrast fill colors so health remains readable over bright spells.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while HP fill colors appear inside specs.colors_hex.
UI art is authored for transparent background compositing at fixed screen anchors.
differences: The atlas contains one enemy HP panel frame and one player HP panel frame with matching ornamental trim.
Enemy fill is crimson and player fill is emerald to match the GDD.
Panel corners use a restrained academy crest motif instead of heavy flourishes so numbers remain the focal point.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load duel_hud_hp_panels.png during Loading and build a 2x1 atlas for player and enemy HUD instances.
runtime_notes: Frame 0 anchors to the upper-right for enemy HP and frame 1 anchors to the lower-right for player HP.
Use UI space placement rather than world transforms so the panel remains stable during camera shake.
Overlay text or fill masks without stretching the gold frame geometry.

context.usage: Fixed HUD asset for enemy and player health tracking during active combat.

layout_notes: Leave a 140x20 px bar interior for dynamic fill masking.
Reserve a 52x24 px number zone inside each frame.
Crest ornament stays inside the outer 20 px margin.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 440x120 px for two 220x120 frames with no frame gutter.
Both HP panel frames remain readable over the backdrop when previewed at 75% scale.
The inner bar region is rectangular and unobstructed for runtime fill masking.
